facts.hypothesis: Founders actively posting about failed ad spend on Reddit/HN will reply to a trigger-referenced cold email at >=10% rate, vs <2% for filter-based targeting
facts.method: 10 emails/day max, all sourced from public pain-signal posts, each email references the specific post

evidence: Prior 155-email run documented in customer-ledger and outreach_log
follow_up: Log each send + reply in outreach_log.txt and customer-ledger.jsonl

summary: EXP-001 has a null/failed interim result: 66 trigger sends produced 0 trigger warm replies, and delivered audits/pitches produced 0 real payments.
inference: The current targeting/offer and audit-to-payment path are not producing paid traction.
decision: Treat the current run as failed for scale decisions; rewrite targeting and audit-to-payment conversion before more volume.
follow_up: CEO/growth/support should define the next smaller test with explicit success/failure criteria before more sends.
